sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55051" key="katarroi+stiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταρρο-ϊστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg036:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, cj. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg036:929b:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">929b27</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ιτικοί, -ητικοί</foreign> codd.).</entryFree>
